__fixture__.name: offline_bundle_blocked_revocation_stale
__fixture__.scenario: An operator attempts to restore an offline bundle exported six months ago. The bundle ships one artifact ('acme-labs/prose-helper' 1.3.0) pulled from an approved_mirror whose revocation snapshot is now stale. Additionally the importer's workspace lockfile has drifted (drift_detected_blocking). The deterministic restore preview emits both block_on_lockfile_drift and block_on_revocation_snapshot_stale steps with repair affordances; restore denies with the corresponding typed denial reasons until the operator either refreshes the revocation snapshot and resolves the lockfile drift or records an out-of-band attestation.
__fixture__.seed_section: Offline-bundle export and import; Denial reasons

known_caveat_labels: Compatibility last confirmed against revocation snapshot dated 2025-10-22; re-verification required.

deterministic_restore_preview.rendered_label: Restore blocked: revocation snapshot for acme-labs/prose-helper 1.3.0 is stale (exported 2025-10-22).
deterministic_restore_preview.repair_affordance_label: Refresh the revocation snapshot from an approved mirror or record an out-of-band attestation explicitly accepting stale revocation.

deterministic_restore_preview.rendered_label: Restore blocked: workspace lockfile has drifted since the bundle's lockfile snapshot.
deterministic_restore_preview.repair_affordance_label: Reconcile the workspace lockfile against the bundle's lockfile, or export a fresh bundle matching the current lockfile.

anti_abuse_signals.signal_label: Publisher acme-labs recorded an orphan marker after the bundle was exported; restore requires operator acknowledgement before proceeding.
